reviews.text:
Austin was incredible for our wedding!

During our engagement session, he knew instinctively what pictures we wanted and made us feel comfortable. On our wedding day, he and his assistant Morgan were a joy to be around. We aren't used to modeling, but Austin's excellent direction turned our moments into frame-worthy photos. He captured staged moments that look naturally candid, and candid photos so delightful they look staged.

Most importantly, Austin captured our unique personalities. He took the time to get to know us and understand our vibe. Whether he was capturing pics of us reading Cthulhu books or dancing with our parents, the photos reflect our vibe perfectly. We highly recommend Austin!

From the moment we met Austin, we knew we'd chosen the right photographer. He is responsive, professional, organized, and so personable. We didn't have an engagement photo location in mind, so he suggested a beautiful spot that checked all the boxes. During the session, he talked us through how he'd shoot the wedding and gave us tips to make day of photos easier. On wedding day, Austin kept things moving smoothly and made photos so fun for us. We loved working with him, and he came up with such beautiful, creative shots that really showed off our venue and perfectly captured the joy and memories of our wedding. We could not have had a better experience or love our photos more! We can't recommend Austin enough!

Austin went above and beyond for us and we could not be more grateful that we were partnered with him! My now-husband and I are not often in front of cameras but our engagement session and wedding day photos would have you think otherwise. We were definitely awkward (lol) but were gently guided into positions/places and were able to laugh as we figured out what to do and how to make the experience fun.

Austin was incredibly friendly from the start and it feels like we've known him far longer than a year! He was so kind throughout the whole process–  sending us a photography guide, planning documents, meeting up for coffee, and more. Getting to know Austin beforehand made our engagement session a breeze and we practically felt like experts by the time our wedding day rolled around.

Austin can also be thought of as a bonus person in your wedding party. My husband joked that he was basically an extra groomsmen with how prepared he was the morning of our wedding. He made all of our wedding party members and family members feel at ease throughout the morning of our wedding. Austin had a second photographer alongside him and it was as if those two have worked together for years because everything was truly seamless!

The photos we received from Austin were absolutely beautiful and we have been so excited to share them with our friends and family. Another wonderful aspect of Austin is he loves dogs and was all hands-on deck to include our dog, Maverick, in both our engagement and wedding day photos!

I'm honestly a little sad we won't be working with Austin for the time-being but when a photography need arises in our future, I know who our first call will be to. Thank you, Austin, for everything! You made our love story feel even more special than it already did.

Austin was incredible to work with. He was diligent, detail-oriented, and made us feel so comfortable and relaxed for our photos. We had a smaller wedding and he made sure all the details and special moments of the day were highlighted. He has excellent vision and execution. I couldn’t recommend him enough!

A little late in writing this review—we've been enjoying life in wedded bliss!

Austin was our wedding photographer last May, and truly, he was exceptional. From the very beginning, he had such a thoughtful approach. He met with us beforehand and also took our engagement photos, which gave us the chance to hang out and get comfortable with him. By the time our wedding day arrived, it felt like we had a friend there capturing our special moments.

Austin was kind, calm, and attentive throughout the entire day, making sure we felt at ease and fully present. And the photos? Absolutely stunning. He captured the emotion, joy, and beauty of the day perfectly.

Chris and I are so grateful we chose Austin, and we wholeheartedly recommend him to anyone looking for a truly gifted and genuine photographer.
